description: A watercolor and ink drawing depicting a grand neoclassical building (the Academy of Arts in St. Petersburg) along a wide open square or embankment. Small figures walk across the square. In the background, the city skyline is visible with domes and spires. The palette is muted with warm yellows for the building and soft greys and blues for the sky and distance. The style is precise yet atmospheric, characteristic of early 20th-century Russian architectural views.
